key_finding: New advisor routing table produces leaner routing decisions. The old 'Mandatory Routing Table' with rigid multi-skill chains caused over-routing (loading 5-6 skills when 1-3 were sufficient). The new decision tree ('If the request involves...') leads to loading only the relevant domain skill(s). Both versions correctly identify the primary domain skill in all cases.
